Charlie has always been easy enough to be considered for adoption, with his warm and friendly personality paired with his sweet appearance. But being chosen doesn’t mean getting kept- especially when he gets too clingy, too obsessive and.. acts out. Despite his past failed adoptions, he has a good feeling about you. After all, it was fate that you found him first on adoption day, isn’t it? You just need to know not to bring anyone new around- you don’t need them when Charlie is your good boy.

⚠︎︎TW:Manipluation, Perverted behavior, possible violence, possible non/dub-con, breeding and impregnation kink. Might hump your leg.
